Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation occurrences across all cases
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' activities

Name: Percentage of variants that include SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation

Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer No Response' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation out of all activities occurring after reviewer assignment (e.g., SW-AE Assign Reviewers)

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in cases where at least one SW-Reviewer Agreed is present
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in variants that eventually lead to SW-EIC Accept
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation compared to SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation that are not followed by any AE recommendation activity within 30 days
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in cases involving multiple reviewer invitations (e.g., Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 or 2)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' activities for cases where activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation occurring in cases that experienced at least one SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation relative to the total number of SW-Reviewer Agreed events
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs

Name: Percentage of variants containing SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation that also contain SW-Reviewer Agreed but not SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in high-duration cases (e.g., performance > 1,000,000 seconds)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' activities

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation that directly follow a sequence ending with SW-Reviewer Agreed without intervening reviewer changes
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in cases that started with Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation and passed through Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' activities for cases where activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation occurring after exactly three distinct reviewer-related activities (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in cases that never reach SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' does not occur
